features: These sheets will ensure your white clothes stay bright and clean. Simply add a sheet to your wash and let the machine do the rest.
20 Sheets Of Miracle White Clothes Booster. Brighter whites and prevents greying wash after wash. Provides effective wash for white clothes.
It can also help to remove yellowing, dinginess and rust stains in laundry due to ageing and hard water. Removes stains caused by rust, red clay, colour bleeds, baby formula and more.

Instructions For Use: Place 1 Sheet at the back of your washing machine's drum before loading the white garments to be washed. Large loads may require 2 sheets, Add washing detergent and select the wash cycle in the normal way. At the end of the wash cycle, remove the whitening sheet and discard it.
Safety Warning: Keep reaching out to children.
